dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8993 IH: Federal Funding Protection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Raskin introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 28, United States Code, to provide for original and concurrent jurisdiction for the district courts over certain civil actions.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Federal Funding Protection Act.

section.header: Original and concurrent jurisdiction of the district courts over certain civil actions
section.text: Section 1346(a) of title 28, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Any civil action against the United States seeking vacation of the termination of a grant made by a Federal agency, if such termination results from any agency action that is the subject of a civil action seeking review under chapter 7 of title 5.
